title: Practice Admin Menu Create Scaffold
goal: Add a minimal create flow on /practice/admin that inserts a new practice_menus row for the selected store, auto-selects the created menu, and reuses the existing metadata edit path for optional fields without touching runtime/store/session/menu/admin helper boundaries.
constraints: Only practice_menus single-table create write is allowed in this slice
Keep menuView.ts, sessionView.ts, adminView.ts, runtime.ts, practiceStore.ts, and types/practice.ts untouched unless a blocker is proven
Reuse existing selectedStore context and updatePracticeMenuMeta boundary patterns
Normalize nullable metadata inputs with trim() || null when optional fields are submitted

Judge extra_changes against this session's git status baseline, with docs/worker/LAST_SESSION.md, docs/worker/LEARNINGS.md, and docs/worker/MISTAKES.md treated as allowed auxiliary files when task-related
acceptance: Admins can create a new menu from /practice/admin even when the current menu list is empty
The created menu appears in the admin list immediately and becomes selectable without breaking the existing metadata editor flow
The new menu is visible through the existing fetchPracticeMenus read path used by both /practice and /practice/admin
npm run build, npm run lint, and npx tsc --noEmit pass, allowing only the documented pre-existing lint/build warnings
